scenarios.description: parse(String, String) invokes Parser.parse with non-empty HTML and baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document has body containing the provided HTML fragment and its baseUri set to the given value

scenarios.description: parse(String, String, Parser) uses provided parser to parse input
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document created by custom parser.parseInput(html, baseUri)
pseudocode:
String html = "
X
"; String baseUri = ""; Parser parser = Parser.xmlParser();

scenarios.description: parse(String, Parser) uses empty baseUri when none provided
parse(String) defaults to empty baseUri and HTML parser
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document.body contains input HTML and baseUri is empty

scenarios.description: parse(File, String, String) loads file with explicit charsetName and baseUri
scenarios.precondition: TempFile 'test.html' created with UTF-8 content "F"; none for mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document.body.html == "F" and baseUri equals given baseUri
pseudocode: File f = tempFile("test.html","F"); String charset = "UTF-8"; String baseUri = "http://base/";

scenarios.description: parse(File, String) uses file path as baseUri when baseUri omitted
scenarios.precondition: TempFile created at known path with content "<u>U</u>"
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document.body.html equals "<u>U</u>" and baseUri equals file.getAbsolutePath()

scenarios.description: parse(File) detects charset BOM or meta and uses file path as baseUri
scenarios.precondition: TempFile created with UTF-8 BOM content "E"
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document.body.html equals "E" and baseUri equals file.getAbsolutePath()

scenarios.description: parse(File, String, String, Parser) uses custom parser for files
scenarios.precondition: TempFile created with XML content "<item>1</item>"; Parser stub returns distinct marker
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document has marker from stub parser.parseInput and baseUri matches
pseudocode: File f = tempFile("test4.xml","<item>1</item>"); String cs="UTF-8"; String uri="u"; Parser parser = stubParserReturningMarker();
Document doc = Jsoup.parse(f, cs, uri, parser);

scenarios.description: parse(Path, String, String) loads from Path with explicit charset and baseUri
scenarios.precondition:
Path to temp file with "

H

" exists
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Document.body.html equals "

H

" and baseUri equals given
pseudocode:
Path p = tempPath("test5.html","

H

"); String cs="UTF-8"; String uri="http://x";

scenarios.description: parse(Path, String) uses path.toAbsolutePath as baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Document.body.html equals "

H2

" and baseUri equals p.toAbsolutePath().toString()

scenarios.precondition:
Path to file with UTF-8 BOM and content "

H3

" exists
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Document.body.html equals "

H3

" and baseUri equals p.toAbsolutePath().toString()

scenarios.description: parse(Path, String, String, Parser) uses custom parser for Path overload
scenarios.precondition: Path to file with XML snippet; stub Parser implements parseInput returns stubbed Document
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document matches stub parser output
pseudocode: Path p = tempPath("test8.xml","<e>8</e>"); Parser parser = stubParser();

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream, String, String) reads from stream and sets baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Document.body.html equals "

S

" and baseUri equals given
pseudocode:
InputStream in = new ByteArrayInputStream("

S

".getBytes()); String cs=null; String uri="u";

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream, String, String, Parser) uses custom parser on InputStream
scenarios.precondition: ByteArrayInputStream with XML; stub Parser to return marker Document
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document contains stub parser marker
pseudocode: InputStream in = new ByteArrayInputStream("<x>1</x>".getBytes()); Parser parser = stubParser();

scenarios.description: parse(URL, int) throws MalformedURLException for unsupported protocol
pseudocode: URL url = new URL("ftp://example.com"); int timeout = 1000;

scenarios.description: parse(URL, int) throws SocketTimeoutException when timeout exceeded
scenarios.precondition: URL url = valid HTTP URL to non-responding host; timeoutMillis = 1;
pseudocode: URL url = new URL("http://10.255.255.1"); int timeout = 1;

scenarios.description: parse(URL, int) returns Document for valid HTTP URL within timeout
scenarios.precondition:
Use embedded HTTP server at localhost:port responding with "

Z

"; timeoutMillis=2000;
pseudocode: URL url = new URL("http://localhost:8080/test"); int timeout = 2000;
